typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ExecutionBatchID as integer (),
	ExternalFactoryCode as integer (),
	MaxUID as integer (),
	ProfilSSIS as string (),
	RMData as string (),
	pDestination as string (),
	pExtFactoryCode as integer (),
	pSource as string (),
	pStage as string ()
}

source(output(
		{Code Formula} as string,
		LIBFRML as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT distinct RTRIM(CAST(q1.[Code Formula] as NVARCHAR(20))) as "Code Formula", q1.[LIBFRML]   FROM [dbo].[ARDM_FORMULA_INFORMATION] q1  INNER JOIN (SELECT [Code Formula], [External Factory Code], MAX([CREATED DATE]) as "Created Date" FROM [dbo].[ARDM_FORMULA_INFORMATION] GROUP BY [Code Formula], [External Factory Code]) q2 ON q1.[Code Formula]=q2.[Code Formula] and q1.[External Factory Code]=q2.[External Factory Code] and q1.[CREATED DATE]=q2.[CREATED DATE]  WHERE q1.[External Factory Code]= ?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> SourceOLEDB	source(output(
		CodeFormula as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT RTRIM(CodeFormula) as CodeFormula FROM ProcessCardFormulas',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> RechercheLKPTABLE
SourceOLEDB derive(UserName = $User__ProfilSSIS,
		LibFrMl_critere = toString(LIBFRML)) ~> Colonnedrive
Colonnedrive,RechercheLKPTABLE lookup({Code Formula} == CodeFormula,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Recherche
Recherche split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> RechercheIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
RechercheIsMatch@NotMatch sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn()) ~> CommandeOLEDB
RechercheIsMatch@NotMatch sink(input(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> CommandeOLEDB1
